extensionDescription.message: Analise relatórios DMARC agregados e forenses localmente no Thunderbird. Identifique ameaças, valide sua autenticação de e-mail e tome medidas.

noFolderNotice.message: No DMARC folders configured. Please open Settings to select your report folders, or create folders matching the naming convention (e.g. DMARC/Aggregate, DMARC/Forensic) for auto-detection.

hintArFolder.message: Select the IMAP folder where DMARC aggregate reports are delivered.

hintFrFolder.message: Select the IMAP folder where DMARC forensic reports are delivered. Optional.

tagLegitimateDesc.message: All messages passed authentication and were delivered normally. This is a legitimate sending source.

tagBlockedDesc.message: All messages failed authentication and were rejected. Your DMARC policy is working correctly against this source.

tagMisconfiguredDesc.message: Some messages passed but others were rejected or quarantined. Check SPF/DKIM configuration for this sending source.

tagThreatDesc.message: Authentication failed but messages were delivered anyway. This source may be spoofing your domain. Consider setting p=reject.

tagThirdPartyDesc.message: This DKIM signature is from a different domain than the Header From. This typically indicates a third-party email service (e.g. SendGrid, Mailchimp).

tagHeloOnlyDesc.message: SPF was only validated via HELO, not MAIL FROM. DMARC alignment requires MAIL FROM (mfrom) for SPF.

tagThirdPartySenderDesc.message: The Envelope From domain differs from Header From. This is common with third-party email services.

tagPossibleSpoofingDesc.message: The Envelope From differs from Header From and all messages failed authentication. This may indicate domain spoofing.

tagForwarderDesc.message: This IP range is associated with email forwarding, which commonly triggers policy overrides.

advicePNone.message: Your policy is p=none — authentication failures are not being enforced. Consider migrating to p=quarantine, then p=reject.

advicePQuarantine.message: Your policy is p=quarantine. No unblocked authentication failures detected — you may be ready to migrate to p=reject.

advicePQuarantineWithFail.message: Your policy is p=quarantine but some authentication failures are being delivered. Review the failed sources before considering p=reject.

advicePRejectClean.message: Your domain is fully protected with p=reject and all messages are passing authentication. No action needed.

adviceAdkimRelaxed.message: DKIM alignment is set to relaxed (adkim=r). Consider strict alignment (adkim=s) for stronger protection.

advicePctPartial.message: Policy is only applied to $1% of messages (pct=$1). If no issues are observed, consider setting pct=100.

issueNoAttachmentDetail.message: No DMARC report attachment found in this message

privacyNote.message: Todo o processamento é local. Sem requisições externas.

warnDateRangeBegin.message: Report date range begin is missing

warnDateRangeEnd.message: Report date range end is missing

warnRecordSourceIp.message: Source IP is missing in record

warnRecordCount.message: Message count is zero in record

warnRecordDkim.message: DKIM evaluation result is missing in record

warnRecordSpf.message: SPF evaluation result is missing in record

warnRecordAuthResults.message: No DKIM or SPF auth_results in record

warnRecordHeaderFrom.message: header_from identifier is missing in record

warnFrDomain.message: Reported domain could not be determined

warnFrArrivalDate.message: Arrival date could not be determined

noResultsNotice.message: Nenhum relatório encontrado no período selecionado. Tente um período mais longo ou verifique as configurações de pasta.
